summary: Backend API testing completed for SmartPay360 new features (Investment Packages, UPI Withdrawal, Notifications). Fixed 1 critical bug in credit_due_package_incomes function. All 41 tests passing (23 new + 18 existing).

critical.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in credit_due_package_incomes function
critical.fix_applied: Added timezone awareness check: if started.tzinfo is None: started = started.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)

minor.issue: Validation order: balance check happens before bank/UPI details validation. User sees 'Insufficient balance' even when bank details are missing.
minor.note: Not a bug, just validation order preference

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: credit_due_package_incomes had datetime timezone mismatch causing 500 error on /api/packages/my
Note: self-transfer endpoint moves main_wallet → e_wallet (not e_wallet → main_wallet). Users need commission/package income to get main_wallet funds for withdrawal.
Withdrawal validation order: PIN → balance → method-specific details. Consider validating method details before balance for better UX.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 1400: added timezone awareness for datetime comparison)
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix mobile numbers during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Investment Packages (GET /api/packages, POST /api/packages/buy, GET /api/packages/my), Withdrawals (POST /api/wallet/withdraw with bank/upi methods, GET /api/wallet/withdrawals), Notifications (GET /api/notifications, POST /api/notifications/read-all) all tested and passing. The datetime bug in credit_due_package_incomes was fixed. Admin credentials: mobile=9999999999, password=Admin@123, PIN=1234.
